summary: Iteration 271: Asset-First Story→Video Architecture - All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: StoryPreview page shows 'Your story is ready' banner with 3 options (Instant Preview, Export MP4, Story Pack), Export MP4 as primary action, Story Pack download working. Pipeline uses only 3 stages (scenes→images→voices). Completed jobs have manifest with job_id/title/scenes/animation_style, story_pack_url (ZIP), and preview_path. No render/upload stages in normal pipeline flow.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend STAGES=['script','scenes','images','voices'] - no render/upload in pipeline_engine.py
VERIFIED: Backend STAGE_RUNNERS only has scenes/images/voices - render/upload in ADMIN_STAGE_RUNNERS (admin-only)
VERIFIED: execute_pipeline stops after voices and generates manifest+ZIP
VERIFIED: _generate_manifest() creates complete manifest with job_id, title, scenes array, animation_style
VERIFIED: status endpoint returns manifest, story_pack_url, preview_path for completed jobs
VERIFIED: Frontend STAGE_LABELS only has Scenes/Images/Voices
VERIFIED: StoryPreview page shows 'Your story is ready' banner (data-testid='ready-banner')
VERIFIED: StoryPreview banner has 3 options: Instant Preview, Export MP4, Story Pack
VERIFIED: Export MP4 button is primary action in header (data-testid='browser-export-toggle-btn')
VERIFIED: Story Pack download button present (data-testid='download-pack-btn')
VERIFIED: resume_pipeline still works for interrupted jobs (rejects completed jobs correctly)

PIPELINE_3_STAGES_ONLY.details: Pipeline runs scenes→images→voices only. No render/upload in normal flow.

MANIFEST_GENERATION.details: Completed jobs have manifest with job_id, title, scenes array (each with image_url, audio_url, duration), animation_style
MANIFEST_GENERATION.evidence: Job a67ff269 manifest has 3 scenes with all required fields

STORY_PACK_ZIP.details: Completed jobs have story_pack_url pointing to R2 ZIP file
STORY_PACK_ZIP.evidence: story_pack_url present and starts with https://...r2.cloudflarestorage.com

PREVIEW_ENDPOINT.details: Returns status, title, total_scenes, scenes_with_images, scenes_with_audio, scenes array, story_pack_url

FRONTEND_READY_BANNER.details: StoryPreview shows 'Your story is ready' banner with 3 options

FRONTEND_EXPORT_MP4_PRIMARY.details: Export MP4 button is primary action in header

FRONTEND_STORY_PACK_DOWNLOAD.details: Story Pack button with working download link

RESUME_ENDPOINT.details: POST /api/pipeline/resume/{job_id} works for interrupted jobs, correctly rejects completed jobs

USER_JOBS_ENDPOINT.details: Shows COMPLETED status with manifest for new jobs

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing completed jobs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 271: Verified the new asset-first architecture. Backend pipeline now completes after scenes+images+voices (no render/upload in normal flow). Completed jobs have manifest field with complete scene data, story_pack_url for ZIP download, and preview_path. Frontend StoryPreview page shows 'Your story is ready' banner with 3 options (Instant Preview, Export MP4, Story Pack). The Export MP4 button is the primary action (browser-side rendering). All 14 backend tests passed. Test job used: a67ff269-1ba5-41d4-a827-9c97cff4d00d (Desert Oasis).
